title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo, former Twitter CEO, discusses predictions for SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs, including timing, valuations, and whether these companies constitute genuine platforms. The episode covers OpenAI's compute commitments, Anthropic's business narrative, and how AI consolidation may create market winners and losers.
